title: Dreamy Malty Australian Lamb Sushi
description: A romantic Australian dish featuring tender lamb, malty flavors, and a hint of Appleton rum, all wrapped up in a halal-friendly sushi package. This unique dish is perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together malt syrup, Appleton rum, soy sauce, sesame oil, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the malty mixture.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Remove the lamb from the refrigerator and let it come to room temperature.
Cook the sushi rice according to the package instructions.
Cut the nori sheets into desired sizes for nigiri.
Shape the cooked sushi rice into small balls and flatten slightly into oval shapes.
Place a small piece of the marinated lamb onto the center of each rice oval.
Fold the nori sheet over the filling to form a triangle or rectangle shape, applying gentle pressure to seal.
Serve the lamb sushi immediately, garnished with toasted sesame seeds if desired.
